start_server.signature: async fn(config: Arc<Config>, ch: ChClient, s3: S3Client, watch: bool, config_path: PathBuf) -> Result<()>

apply_env_overlay.note: Handles S3_BUCKET, S3_ACCESS_KEY, S3_SECRET_KEY, S3_REGION, S3_ENDPOINT, S3_PREFIX, S3_ASSUME_ROLE_ARN, S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE, CLICKHOUSE_HOST, CLICKHOUSE_PORT, CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME, CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD, CLICKHOUSE_DATA_PATH, API_LISTEN, CHBACKUP_LOG_LEVEL, CHBACKUP_LOG_FORMAT. Does NOT handle WATCH_INTERVAL or FULL_INTERVAL.

findings.watch_env_gap: Design doc section 10.9 shows WATCH_INTERVAL and FULL_INTERVAL as env vars in K8s manifest, but src/config.rs:apply_env_overlay() does NOT handle these. Either: (a) add them to env overlay, or (b) use --env flag in K8s args, or (c) use config file mounted via ConfigMap.
findings.altinity_vs_vanilla: Existing Dockerfile.test uses altinity/clickhouse-server, not clickhouse/clickhouse-server. CI matrix CH versions from design doc (23.8, 24.3, 24.8, 25.1) need Altinity version tags.
findings.production_dockerfile_missing: No production Dockerfile exists yet. Only Dockerfile.test (integration test image).
findings.github_actions_missing: No .github/ directory exists. CI workflow needs to be created from scratch.
findings.k8s_manifest_missing: No Kubernetes manifest examples exist. Need to create from design doc sections 1.3 and 10.9.
